```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
set.seed(sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1))

## Parâmetros aleatórios
alpha <- sample(c(2, 3, 4, 5), 1)
beta  <- sample(c(1, 2, 3), 1)
xbar  <- round(alpha / beta + runif(1, -0.5, 0.5), 2)
s2    <- round(alpha / beta^2 + runif(1, -0.2, 0.2), 3)
## Garantir s2 > 0
s2 <- max(s2, 0.05)

## Resposta correta: beta_hat = xbar / s2
correct <- round(xbar / s2, 4)

## Alternativas incorretas plausíveis
w1 <- round(s2 / xbar, 4)
w2 <- round(xbar^2 / s2, 4)
w3 <- round(xbar / s2 + 1, 4)
w4 <- round(s2 / xbar^2, 4)

## Garantir unicidade
if (w1 == correct) w1 <- round(s2 / xbar + 0.1, 4)
if (w2 == correct) w2 <- round(xbar^2 / s2 + 0.1, 4)
if (w3 == correct) w3 <- round(xbar / s2 + 2, 4)
if (w4 == correct) w4 <- round(s2 / xbar^2 + 0.1, 4)
if (w2 == w1)      w2 <- round(xbar^2 / s2 - 0.1, 4)
if (w3 == w1 || w3 == w2) w3 <- round(xbar / s2 - 1, 4)
if (w4 == w1 || w4 == w2 || w4 == w3) w4 <- round(s2^2 / xbar, 4)

## Embaralhamento SEMPRE
all_vals <- c(correct, w1, w2, w3, w4)
# Garante cinco alternativas numericamente distintas após a parametrização.
integer_choices <- all(abs(all_vals - round(all_vals)) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))
choice_step <- if (integer_choices) 1 else max(1e-4, max(abs(all_vals), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.01)
while (anyDuplicated(all_vals)) {
  duplicate_position <- which(duplicated(all_vals))[1]
  all_vals[duplicate_position] <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE) + choice_step
}
choices <- sample(all_vals)
sol_pos <- which(choices == correct)
sol_str <- paste(as.integer(seq_along(choices) == sol_pos), collapse = "")
```

Question
========

Seja $X \sim \text{Gama}(\alpha, \beta)$ com $E(X) = \alpha/\beta$ e $\text{Var}(X) = \alpha/\beta^2$. O método dos momentos resolve o sistema $\bar{X} = \hat{\alpha}/\hat{\beta}$ e $\hat{\sigma}^2 = \hat{\alpha}/\hat{\beta}^2$. Dividindo a segunda equação pela primeira: $\hat{\beta}_{MM} = \bar{X}/\hat{\sigma}^2$. Com $\bar{X} = `r xbar`$ e $\hat{\sigma}^2 = `r s2`$, calcule $\hat{\beta}_{MM}$.

Answerlist
----------

* `r choices[1]`
* `r choices[2]`
* `r choices[3]`
* `r choices[4]`
* `r choices[5]`

Solution
========

Das equações do método dos momentos:
$$\bar{X} = \frac{\hat{\alpha}}{\hat{\beta}}, \quad \hat{\sigma}^2 = \frac{\hat{\alpha}}{\hat{\beta}^2}.$$
Dividindo: $\hat{\sigma}^2 / \bar{X} = 1/\hat{\beta}$, logo $\hat{\beta}_{MM} = \bar{X}/\hat{\sigma}^2 = `r xbar`/`r s2` = `r correct`$. Em seguida, $\hat{\alpha}_{MM} = \bar{X} \cdot \hat{\beta}_{MM} = `r round(xbar * correct, 4)`$.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap3S1Q6_emm_gama
extype: schoice
exsolution: `r sol_str`
exshuffle: FALSE
